core_mechanism: superstatistics: a compound/parameter-mixed stochastic process in which a fast memoryless (Poisson/exponential) process has its rate parameter itself drawn from a slow distribution (here inverse-chi-square), so the observed statistics are the marginal superposition of exponentials, generically producing broad, heavy-tailed distributions
brief_reason: The abstract models the process as underlying Poisson processes whose parameters are inverse-chi-square distributed, i.e. a rate-mixed (superstatistical) superposition of exponential processes.
